subject: [SDNC] Fix service template for ServiceMesh case
commit_message:
[SDNC] Fix service template for ServiceMesh case

sdnc-oam service was not created correctly in case of
a nonTLS deployment

Issue-ID: OOM-2495

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: I095f8a466d9d1df62800a28d2538e75db597e023
